message:
🐛 Remove status trigger from Copilot PR Automation (#198)

The `status: {}` trigger fired on every commit status update in the
repo, causing 60+ runs in 7 minutes.  Worse, the workflow itself calls
createCommitStatus (DCO override), which generates a new status event,
creating a feedback loop.

- Remove `status` trigger — `check_run: completed` already covers DCO
  and Netlify check completions
- Remove the status event handler code path
- Add concurrency group to cancel duplicate runs for the same PR

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
